compile_check.bibtex_warning_log: Paper/main.blg reports warning$ -- 0 after citation repair.

supported_claims: C-CRP v3 ranks first against eight official-code-level baselines on Sports, Toys, Home, and Tools under the 10k-user/101-candidate same-candidate protocol.
Each domain has 56/56 positive Holm-significant C-CRP-vs-official paired metric tests.
Event-level C-CRP uncertainty stratifies ranking reliability as descriptive motivation evidence.
Component ablations are complete and show weak, redundant, or mixed component behavior rather than universal component necessity.
Hyperparameter evidence supports NDCG@10 stability/sensitivity for eta and the uncertainty weight grid.
The framework figure is usable as a pipeline overview.
forbidden_claims: universal recommender SOTA beyond tested same-candidate domains
positive eta or risk penalty is necessary or uniformly beneficial
older calibration/ECE or older-domain SOTA narrative without fresh current evidence gate

remaining_checks: Run a final ARIS citation audit/spot-check against publisher pages before submission.
Check future/accepted 2026 ProEx/ProMax venue metadata again when proceedings pages are final.
